name: USS COLE: Al Qaeda's Strike Before 9/11
original_name: USS COLE: Al Qaeda's Strike Before 9/11
overview: The USS Cole bombing was more than a tragedy—it was the warning America ignored. Seventeen sailors dead, a warship nearly lost, and Washington looking the other way. This is the untold story of how a blast in Yemen became the blueprint for 9/11.

trailers.title: USS COLE: Al Qaeda’s Strike Before 9/11 | Official Trailer
